feed.title: SkillsLLM
feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), Glama (blog, MCP servers, release notes), LobeHub (changelog + blog), and AI Skill Market

entry.title: Merchant of Record, Explained: Paddle vs. Stripe
entry.content: Stripe processes payments; Paddle becomes the legal seller. For a solo founder selling digital products across borders, that distinction decides who handles VAT, GST, refunds, and chargebacks — you or them.

entry.title: Why Stripe Won't Let You Take Payments Yet
entry.content: You created a Stripe account, sent a payment link, and hit 'your account cannot currently make live charges.' Here's what actually activates live mode — and the shortest path from zero to a real first dollar.

entry.title: Pillar Pages and Content Clusters for AI Citation
entry.content: Digital Applied found 86% of AI citations come from sites with 5+ interlinked pieces on one topic. Yext found a bidirectionally-linked cluster gets cited 2.7x more than an isolated page. AI crawlers read internal links as a map — here's how to structure content as one knowledge node.

entry.title: Ten Schema Tags That Get You Cited by AI
entry.content: Schema markup alone does nothing — Ahrefs tested 1,885 pages and adding it with no content change produced no citation lift. But Organization and FAQPage JSON-LD on top of real content earn 2.7x more AI citations. Here's the code and the deployment checklist.

entry.title: The Reddit Playbook for Solo Founders Who Hate Marketing
entry.content: Reddit is Perplexity's #1 source at 46.7% of top citations and #1 in Google AI Overviews at 21%. One genuinely useful 30-minute answer keeps getting pulled into AI responses indefinitely. Here's the minimal-effort playbook — and why this window won't stay open.

entry.title: Why AI Engines Cite Reddit Over Your Homepage
entry.content: AI engines trust what others say about you far more than what you say about yourself. Muck Rack found 82% of AI citations come from earned media, under 6% from brand-owned pages. The real work of GEO isn't polishing your copy — it's getting mentioned elsewhere.

entry.title: Search Traffic Forked: SEO and GEO Are Different Games
entry.content: Search just split into two paths: the ranked blue-link list and the AI-generated answer that quotes a few sources nobody clicks. SEO races for rank; GEO races to be the source the AI draws from. Here's why the distinction reorders how solo founders get found.

entry.title: The Compliance Deadline That Costs $25,000 If You Miss It
entry.content: Most 'form a US LLC' guides stop at the EIN. The part they skip can cost $25,000: Form 5472, required annually from foreign-owned LLCs even at zero revenue. Plus the BOI rule that changed in 2025 and the state report you still owe.

entry.title: Getting an EIN Without a Social Security Number
entry.content: No SSN? You can still get an EIN by phone or fax — the widely-repeated claim that the IRS killed the fax channel is wrong. Here's the SS-4 prep that keeps you from getting rejected: Line 7b, Line 11, Line 15, and the Responsible Party rule.

entry.title: Wyoming vs. Delaware vs. California for a Solo LLC
entry.content: Why an LLC beats a C-Corp for most solo founders, and which state to form in. Wyoming's $60-a-year default, Delaware's investor pull, and California's $800 franchise-tax trap — plus the registered-agent requirement nobody explains until you're stuck.

entry.title: Give Your AI Agent Legs: Control It From Your Phone
entry.content: The real payoff of a personal mesh VPN: run an AI coding agent on a home machine and drive it from your phone while the task keeps running. Here's the latency math, the security details that matter, and the one hard limit to plan around.

entry.title: Access Your Home Server From Anywhere, No Open Ports
entry.content: Tailscale turns every device you own into one private network — no public IP, no firewall rules, no forwarded ports. Here's the connection model that makes it work, and the one thing that quietly leaves you stuck on relay latency.

entry.title: Build a Waitlist Page in 30 Minutes, Zero Servers
entry.content: A concrete 6-step path from empty folder to a live email-capture page — frontend, backend, and database — deployed worldwide on Cloudflare for $0, before a single line of the real product exists. The fastest way to test if anyone wants the thing.

entry.title: Deploy Global Infrastructure for Free on Cloudflare
entry.content: Cloudflare Workers and Pages replace 'rent a VPS and configure nginx' with 'push code, it runs in 335 cities.' Here's why serverless-at-the-edge is a different model, where the free tier ceiling actually sits, and how Pages and Workers are the same primitive.

entry.title: Keeping Your Free Oracle VPS From Getting Reclaimed
entry.content: Oracle's free tier has one real string attached: it reclaims idle instances. Here's what 'idle' actually means for a dev box, the keep-alive pattern that works, why community scripts are a fragile bet, and the fix that ends the problem for good.

entry.title: Oracle's Always-Free Tier: The Server Everyone Forgets
entry.content: Oracle Cloud quietly gives away a permanent 4-core, 24GB-RAM ARM server that would cost $80-100/month on AWS. Here's why signups get rejected, the region choice you can't undo, and how to actually get the machine.

entry.title: Your First US Bank Card Without Setting Foot in America
entry.content: The four-piece kit a non-resident founder needs before a US bank says yes: ITIN, a CMRA-clean address, a US SIM, and a Wise account, plus the card application.

entry.title: The ITIN Path: A US Tax ID Without a US Address
entry.content: What an ITIN is, why a Certifying Acceptance Agent beats mailing your passport to the IRS, the 8-12 week timeline, and why it's the first US-entity domino.

entry.title: Ship a Static Site With Nothing but Git Push
entry.content: Why GitHub Pages beats Vercel, Netlify, and a VPS for a solo founder's first landing page: zero cost, no third-party login, and the deploy is a git push.

entry.title: Domain Name to Live DNS in Twenty Minutes
entry.content: Registrar tradeoffs, why to route DNS through Cloudflare, the DNSSEC gotcha that takes domains offline, and the orange-vs-grey cloud rule for GitHub Pages.

entry.title: The Questions Every Teacher Asks Before Signing Up
entry.content: Eligibility, verification, cost, data privacy, and what happens if you change schools — the practical FAQ for ChatGPT for Teachers, and a look back at the series.

entry.title: What Happens When the Free Period Ends in 2027
entry.content: ChatGPT for Teachers is free only through June 2027. OpenAI hasn't said what comes next. Here's what's known, what's speculation, and what to plan for regardless.

entry.title: No, Students Don't Get Free ChatGPT Too
entry.content: ChatGPT for Teachers is a teacher-and-staff offer, not a student one — and several big districts ban student ChatGPT outright. Untangling the confusion.

entry.title: Choosing a Pilot: A Decision Guide for Districts
entry.content: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Copilot for your district AI pilot? A practical framework built on the stack you already run, real per-seat prices, and priorities.

entry.title: Building the Skill a Free Chatbot Can't Replace
entry.content: A free, general teacher assistant is genuinely useful — and structurally incapable of three things a purpose-built skill does. Here's the line between them.

entry.title: Where AI Tutoring Skills Fit Between the Giants
entry.content: ChatGPT for Teachers and Claude for Teachers are both teacher-facing productivity tools. The student-facing Socratic tutor is a niche neither giant is actually filling.

entry.title: What Claude Skill Builders Can Learn From OpenAI
entry.content: OpenAI's education playbook — narrow vertical, distribution through a trusted intermediary, free to build the habit — is a GTM lesson for anyone building a Claude Code skill.

entry.title: The Squeeze on Third-Party Classroom AI Tools
entry.content: Paid lesson-planning and differentiation tools now compete with something free from the model vendor itself. What the squeeze looks like, and which tools escape it.

entry.title: What a Free Vertical AI Product Means for EdTech
entry.content: When the model vendor ships a free, polished, education-specific product directly to teachers, the ecosystem built on its general-purpose API has to rethink what it's for.

entry.title: Piloting ChatGPT for Teachers District-Wide
entry.content: A free tool still costs you a rollout. How to pilot ChatGPT for Teachers across a district — cohort selection, a real feedback loop, and the scale-or-stop decision.

entry.title: Role-Based Access Control for School Workspaces
entry.content: Who should be an admin, who should be a member, and the RBAC misconfigurations that quietly hand a whole district's AI workspace to the wrong people. A practical guide for K-12 IT.

entry.title: Reading the Student Data Privacy Agreement
entry.content: OpenAI names itself a FERPA 'School Official' and says student data stays under the school's control. Here's what those terms actually commit — and what a privacy officer should still ask.

entry.title: SSO, MFA, and the District IT Rollout Plan
entry.content: The mechanics of a managed ChatGPT for Teachers deployment: claim the domain, wire up SAML SSO, enforce MFA, and onboard teachers in phases without flooding the help desk.

entry.title: A Procurement Checklist for ChatGPT for Teachers
entry.content: It's free, so districts skip procurement. That's the mistake. Here's the checklist an IT director should run before ChatGPT for Teachers reaches a single classroom.

entry.title: When Voice Mode Beats Typing in the Classroom
entry.content: Voice mode isn't a gimmick for teachers. It wins in the exact moments a classroom leaves your hands full and your keyboard out of reach. Here's when to talk instead of type.

entry.title: Image Generation for Worksheets and Slides
entry.content: How to use ChatGPT for Teachers' image generation for worksheets, slides, and classroom visuals — and why every AI-generated diagram needs an accuracy check first.

entry.title: Differentiation and IEP Support, Carefully Done
entry.content: How to use ChatGPT for Teachers to draft differentiated materials and IEP-aligned supports — and exactly where FERPA caution around student-identifying data has to stop you.

entry.title: Writing Parent Emails Without the Dread
entry.content: How ChatGPT for Teachers helps draft difficult parent emails — setting tone, structuring hard news, and translating — with the rule to always personalize and review first.

entry.title: Turning File Uploads Into Faster Grading Prep
entry.content: How file uploads in ChatGPT for Teachers speed up rubric-building and feedback drafting — without letting AI grade for you or auto-send anything to students.

entry.title: Co-Planning Lessons in Shared Projects
entry.content: How ChatGPT for Teachers' shared projects turn department co-planning from a Friday scramble into a durable, shared workspace. A realistic PLC workflow.

entry.title: Building a Custom GPT for Your Department
entry.content: A custom GPT turns a good prompt into a reusable tool your whole department shares. Here's how to build a rubric-grader or differentiation GPT that actually gets used.

entry.title: The Four-Way AI Vendor Race for the Classroom
entry.content: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Microsoft are all racing for the same classrooms — with four different strategies. Here's how the board actually looks.

entry.title: Why OpenAI Chose Free Over a Freemium Tier
entry.content: OpenAI could have shipped a discounted teacher tier. It shipped a fully free one through June 2027. The go-to-market logic behind that choice is worth reading.

entry.title: Context Windows, Compared for Classroom Use
entry.content: Token context sounds abstract until you try uploading a whole class set of essays. Here's what 400K vs 1M–2M tokens actually means for a teacher's day.

entry.title: The Real Price of "Free": A Cost Comparison
entry.content: ChatGPT for Teachers is free per seat — but adoption isn't. Here's the true cost of rolling it out versus paid Gemini, Copilot, and Claude for schools.

entry.title: ChatGPT for Teachers vs Microsoft Copilot in Class
entry.content: Same GPT-5.1 engine, different chassis. A free standalone workspace versus an Office-native paid tier — and why the model isn't what decides this one.

entry.title: Gemini for Education: The Google Gravity Case
entry.content: For a Google-shop district, the AI question isn't which model is smarter. It's whether Workspace gravity and NotebookLM beat a free standalone ChatGPT.

entry.title: Claude for Education: The Other Free Offer
entry.content: OpenAI isn't the only company giving teachers AI for free. Anthropic's education play — a free K-12 offer plus a paid, partner-rich tier — is the quieter alternative.

entry.title: The Conflict-of-Interest Question in AI Training
entry.content: AI vendors are funding the union that trains teachers to use their tools. That's a real conflict worth naming — and the safeguards deserve a fair hearing too.

entry.title: Free for Teachers, Banned for Students: The Split
entry.content: OpenAI is courting teachers with a free workspace while districts ban ChatGPT for students. Is that a contradiction — or two different problems wearing one name?

entry.title: Oregon Teachers Are Calling AI Deals a "Grift"
entry.content: An Oregon NEA rank-and-file caucus wants an end to what it calls 'AI grift.' Here's what that grassroots pushback represents — and what it doesn't, within a mixed union landscape.

entry.title: What the MIT Cognitive Engagement Study Found
entry.content: An MIT study found students who used ChatGPT to write essays showed weaker cognitive engagement. Here's what that implies for student use — and why teacher use is a different case.

entry.title: Baltimore, LA, NYC, Seattle: Why They Banned ChatGPT
entry.content: Major districts banned ChatGPT over integrity and quality fears. Now OpenAI is courting those same districts with free teacher accounts. Are the two positions contradictory?

entry.title: Why Detection Tools Miss 1 in 5 AI Essays
entry.content: AI-writing detectors run roughly 80-90% accurate — and most don't publish rates at all. Here's why that's not good enough to be a teacher's primary defense.

entry.title: The Cheating Numbers Behind ChatGPT for Teachers
entry.content: A Study.com survey found over a quarter of teachers have caught a student cheating with ChatGPT. Here's what that number actually measures — and what it doesn't.

entry.title: Can a Course Make 400,000 Teachers AI-Literate
entry.content: The AFT's academy promises to train 400,000 teachers on AI in five years. But scale and depth pull against each other — can standardized training build real literacy?

entry.title: ChatGPT Foundations for Teachers, Reviewed
entry.content: A fair critical review of OpenAI's free teacher course — what it teaches well, and the gaps around AI grading, hallucination, and detection it glosses over.

entry.title: Inside the AI Skills Jam for K-12 Educators
entry.content: OpenAI's AI Skills Jam took the teacher training on the road — in-person workshops across US cities that drew 1,600+ educators. Here's what the format looks like.

entry.title: What OpenAI's Free Teacher AI Course Covers
entry.content: OpenAI Academy runs two free courses for K-12 teachers: AI Foundations and ChatGPT Foundations for Teachers. Here's the actual syllabus, section by section.

entry.title: Three Rivals, One Classroom: AFT's AI Coalition
entry.content: OpenAI, Microsoft, and Anthropic compete everywhere else — but co-funded the same $23M union program to train 400,000 teachers. Here's why.

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: mcplex
entry.content: mcplex

entry.title: yoliani-skills
entry.content: Edgardo Yoliani's agent skills — remote execution with crabbox and more.

entry.title: scwap
entry.content: Super Caveman with a Ponytail — process (Superpowers), build restraint (Ponytail), terse prose (Caveman), and frontend craft checks (Impeccable).

entry.title: openiap
entry.content: Inspect and implement in-app purchase flows with OpenIAP and IAPKit.

entry.title: creditgauge
entry.content: Provider-agnostic Claude Code statusline plugin (CreditGauge) for token-plan usage and account balance. Picks the provider from ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (currently MiniMax + DeepSeek); hides itself otherwise. Visibility of the age annotation follows a template-driven priority: if lineTemplate includes m_age it emits unconditionally (🔗 fresh / ⛓️‍💥 stale); otherwise the stale fallback appends ⛓️‍💥 X ago only when displaying cached data after a fetch failure. Falls back to 'Usage:/Balance: not available!' when no cached data exists. Composes with another statusline via the CREDITGAUGE_UPSTREAM_CMD env var.

entry.title: github-triage
entry.content: Triage recently-filed GitHub issues and rate their readiness for agent implementation.

entry.title: vg
entry.content: Vibgrate AI Context for Claude Code: a local-first MCP server with a deterministic code map (impact, navigation, search) plus version-correct, drift-annotated library docs. No API key.

entry.title: deepthink
entry.content: Raisonnement arborescent MCTS multi-agents : explore un problème décisionnel via un arbre de conséquences, évalue chaque branche, recommande le meilleur chemin.

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Intelligent context-window optimization: caching, compression, and smart file tooling that cut token usage 60-90%. Bundles the token-optimizer MCP server plus a usage skill and automatic-optimization hooks.

entry.title: maverick-legal-research
entry.content: Research current US statutes, regulations, and case law with Maverick.

entry.title: nature-academic-search
entry.content: Academic Paper Search across CrossRef, PubMed, arXiv, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, Semantic Scholar, and ClinicalTrials.gov.

entry.title: ai-dev-workflow
entry.content: Daily full-stack AI dev workflow: context-load (/sync), orchestrated plan->execute->verify->document loop (/flow) with investigate-confirm-act gates, project bootstrap (/init), session close (/wrap). Depends on Superpowers, context-mode, agentmemory.

entry.title: magpie
entry.content: Magpie website intelligence over a hosted MCP server. Free: a single-page audit covering overall score, Core Web Vitals, on-page SEO, security headers, robots/sitemap, and WordPress-aware findings. Pro: rank tracking (Google positions and movement over time) and competitor keyword-gap analysis.

entry.title: mwdat-android
entry.content: Git-native DAT SDK guidance for android development, covering setup, camera streaming, display access, MockDeviceKit, session lifecycle, permissions, debugging, and sample app patterns.

entry.title: starter
entry.content: Example plugin demonstrating the skill and slash command layout.

entry.title: agent-review
entry.content: Package recently finished agent work into a review-run bundle on this repo's Astro review site (public/reviews/runs/), then commit and push.

entry.title: doc-writer-toolkit
entry.content: Skills and commands for writing product documentation (API reference pages, user guides, concept topics, translations, alignment checks), plus bundled content rules: style guide, grammar rules, glossary, and page templates.

entry.title: deepseek
entry.content: Use DeepSeek from Claude Code to review code (ship/no-ship gate) or delegate a review.

entry.title: adrian-cc
entry.content: Adrian runtime security: observability and blocking for Claude Code sessions

entry.title: kimi
entry.content: Use Kimi Code from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

entry.title: firmament
entry.content: Your team's shared, verified knowledge for AI agents: ask what's true about your org and how work gets done, then record what you learn.

entry.title: ai-monitor
entry.content: GitHub Issue/PR を tmux + Claude Code + gh CLI で自動オーケストレーションするワークフロープラグイン

entry.title: nvim-aware-claude
entry.content: Make Claude Code aware of a running Neovim session: live current file, cursor, selection, search, quickfix list, windows, and buffers.

entry.title: ray-skills
entry.content: ray-do-harness, ray-qc-browser-verify, ray-read-figma, ray-super-harness skills + ray-qc agent.

entry.title: nodestorm
entry.content: Visual architecture brainstorming with human decisions over MCP.

entry.title: gpt-image-2-prompts
entry.content: AI skill for recommending GPT Image 2 image generation prompts

entry.title: charlie
entry.content: Voice-driven code review: /charlie:review walks you through your diff chunk by chunk — Charlie explains each aloud, you approve/flag/question by voice, and Claude fixes the flags.

entry.title: world-clock
entry.content: Time tools for Claude from worldclock.pro: current time anywhere, timezone conversion, DST transitions, coordinate lookup, and city search. Bundles the remote MCP server plus a skill that knows how to use it.

entry.title: agent-hub
entry.content: Use one Agent Hub MCP for LLM-planned adaptive workflows, cross-model consistency, shared memory, and Git-artifact handoff in Claude Code.

entry.title: mlx-agent
entry.content: Structured local MLX discovery, adoption, and wiring for Apple Silicon agents.

entry.title: callee
entry.content: Run Markdown-defined agents and deterministic workflows.

entry.title: cadence
entry.content: A planning and execution system for a single developer in Claude Code: one disciplined discuss/plan/execute/verify loop, state in files not conversation, opinionated defaults, a deliberately small surface.

entry.title: ivygrep
entry.content: Local code search and relationship-aware task context for coding agents

entry.title: baychat
entry.content: Connect this Claude Code session to a BayChat group chat — pair with a code, learn the room via onboard, catch up on long conversations via the rolling summary, and participate as a well-behaved agent that understands roles, reply policies, and orchestration

entry.title: apptive
entry.content: 동아리 Figma 템플릿과 동일한 형식의 발표 자료(PDF)를 마크다운에서 생성하는 스킬

entry.title: taskforce
entry.content: Task Force agent skills for project and task management.

entry.title: mherzog4-skills
entry.content: Skills by mherzog4 — starting with volley, intellectual tennis for stress-testing ideas.

entry.title: agent-tools
entry.content: GRID spreadsheet tools for Claude Code — load, read, edit, and recalculate .xlsx workbooks via the @grid-is/agent-tools MCP server.

entry.title: openbrain
entry.content: openbrain personal memory for Claude Code: MCP tools, openbrain:* skills, SessionStart push-recall, and Stop/PreCompact capture over the thin openbrain CLI.

entry.title: nano-banana-pro-prompts
entry.content: AI skill for recommending image generation prompts

entry.title: applycairn
entry.content: Private Career Memory for evidence-backed reviews, promotions, compensation cases, role justification, and job search

entry.title: vibeshub
entry.content: Upload Claude Code and Codex CLI conversation traces to vibeshub when a PR is created (for Cursor, install vibeshub from the Cursor marketplace)

entry.title: emu-ai-mem
entry.content: Shared, Git-backed memory and local MCP tools for Claude sessions and small teams

entry.title: seedance-2-prompts
entry.content: AI skill for recommending Seedance 2 video generation prompts

entry.title: claude_harness_eng_v5
entry.content: Claude Harness Engine scaffold for autonomous long-running application development

entry.title: git-workflow
entry.content: Atomic-commit Git workflow skills: folding changes into the right commit (amend/edit/fixup), conflict resolution, reflog-based undo, and bisect debugging, plus shared conventions (rebase-over-merge, stashing, commit-message style).

entry.title: system-reality-alignment
entry.content: Design, review, plan, repair, implement, and operate real-world systems with traceable observations, explicit semantics, verifiable decisions, and closed feedback loops.

entry.title: api-ai-toolkit
entry.content: An API toolkit focused on api design

entry.title: content-brain
entry.content: Interview-driven setup that builds your own Obsidian content brain: ingests all your content, transcribes your audio and video, tags it to your frameworks, and distills your Voice DNA. Everything up to a content system, none of the content system itself. Built for Roland Frasier's Dragonfly Mastermind.

entry.title: i-have-dyslexia
entry.content: Shape Claude Code output for a dyslexic reader: short sentences, one idea per line, a fixed reply skeleton, bold anchors, no walls of text.

entry.title: project-doctor
entry.content: Project health checkup skill for AI-built projects. Diagnosis is read-only, only approved fixes run, always undoable. Reports in Korean.

entry.title: SkillsSafe
entry.content: SkillsSafe

entry.title: PrompyAI
entry.content: PrompyAI

entry.title: klanex-mcp
entry.content: klanex-mcp

entry.title: awesome-awesome
entry.content: awesome-awesome

entry.title: gemini-vision-mcp
entry.content: gemini-vision-mcp

entry.title: Obsidian Project Management MCP Server
entry.content: Obsidian Project Management MCP Server

entry.title: Log Reducer
entry.content: Log Reducer

entry.title: LeadDelta MCP Server
entry.content: LeadDelta MCP Server

entry.title: mcp-auth-poc
entry.content: mcp-auth-poc

entry.title: nanocart-mcp
entry.content: nanocart-mcp

entry.title: tovr
entry.content: TOVR engineering toolkit for Claude Code — the monochrome design system (tovr-design), the freight-intelligence MCP skill, and a vendored big-task flow (research, wayfinder, grilling, to-spec, to-tickets, implement, code-review, triage) tuned to the TOVR stack.

entry.title: light-mem
entry.content: Lightweight persistent memory for Claude Code and OpenCode. In-process embeddings, no external services.

entry.title: verity-discipline
entry.content: Discipline gates for AI coding agents — reuse-first (never rebuild what exists), search-before-concluding, and safe-install vetting. Stops the three most expensive agent failure modes.

entry.title: team-starter
entry.content: Starter plugin demonstrating skills, agents, and hooks

entry.title: thirsty-claude
entry.content: Estimates the water footprint of your Claude Code sessions from local token counts. A transparent model with editable coefficients, not a measurement. Reads no message content; the estimator makes no network calls, and the leaderboard that does is opt-in.

entry.title: engineering-workflows
entry.content: Portable, proportional engineering workflows for disciplined development without mandatory ceremony.

entry.title: ognistie-skill
entry.content: Recommends the least expensive Anthropic model that can complete a supplied task reliably

entry.title: aix-skills
entry.content: All embedded, MCU debugging, firmware, and library-integration Agent Skills maintained in this repository.

entry.title: veaf-mission-editor
entry.content: Author VEAF DCS missions from Claude Code — create, edit, validate and build a mission through the veaf-mission-mcp server, guided by the veaf-mission-authoring skill.

entry.title: hoangsa
entry.content: HOANGSA context engineering — /hoangsa:* workflow commands, worker agents, and memory-discipline skills. Pair with the hoangsa installer for enforcement hooks and the hoangsa-memory MCP server.

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: Run and schedule AI coding agents in isolated git worktrees with the Agent Factory (af) CLI

entry.title: claude-code-analytics
entry.content: Claude / Claude Code の利用統計を収集するプラグイン

entry.title: tcgd
entry.content: Evidence-backed PyTorch CUDA Graph tensor and allocator-memory investigations with torch-cudagraph-debug: the tcgd-investigate skill and the tcgd-debugger agent.

entry.title: mac-wallet
entry.content: Safe agent workflows for inspecting balances and sending configured EVM assets with macwlt.

entry.title: budget-controller
entry.content: Real-time spend governance for Claude Code - blocks risky tool calls locally and gates each turn against a personal prompt-count cap, since no Anthropic API can report real cost to an individual account.

entry.title: agents-schema
entry.content: Connect to a data warehouse and discover metadata through its AGENTS schema.

entry.title: scout-brand-guidelines
entry.content: Apply PrimeRFP SCOUT brand guidelines to reports and documents generated from SCOUT MCP data — official colors, fonts, logo usage, and report structure for opportunity summaries, competitive intelligence, award history, and landscape analyses.

entry.title: from-github
entry.content: Zero-embed agentgear example plugin: installed from a GitHub marketplace, not baked into the binary.

entry.title: claude-mem
entry.content: Persistent memory system for Claude Code - seamlessly preserve context across sessions

entry.title: outpost
entry.content: Outpost: the core coding-discipline prompts as skills, plus the plugin commands, a review agent, a context hook, and the ledger-voice output style. Generated from the catalog.

entry.title: novel-to-game
entry.content: 把小说转成游戏企划与可完整游玩的网页游戏原型。

entry.title: fable-codex-bridge
entry.content: Hands Claude Fable classifier fallbacks to GPT-5.6 Sol through Codex instead of retrying on Opus.

entry.title: maestro-agora
entry.content: Use /agora for argument-first buyer, investor, positioning, editorial, interface, and spoken copy grounded in verified facts.

entry.title: robotics-day
entry.content: One command, /new-robotics-day, that authors the next daily lesson notebook of a day-by-day robotics curriculum: intuition-first, runnable cells, deliberate-practice stretch, and a build-in-public blurb.

entry.title: grok
entry.content: Delegate coding tasks from Claude Code to Grok Build.

entry.title: jj-workflow
entry.content: Parallel-agent feature workflow for jj repos: claim/start feature workspaces, refresh against trunk, integrate back — with a config-based trunk-immutability guard, a git/flag-ban hook, and conflict tooling.

entry.title: ai-config-sync
entry.content: AI Agent 配置同步：scan / capture / restore / doctor。安装本插件即可使用（内置 CLI，无需单独 npm 全局安装）。

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: AI memory system — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 36 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, guided setup.

entry.title: prd
entry.content: Turn a raw idea into a structured PRD through a guided, one-question-at-a-time interview.

entry.title: flutter
entry.content: Best-of-breed general Flutter engineering skills — architecture, Riverpod 3.x state, testing, persistence, i18n/RTL, accessibility, performance, plus codegen/CI/migration runbooks — usable in any Flutter app.

entry.title: lopi
entry.content: Multi-agent Claude Code orchestrator — submit tasks, watch agents run, check status from inside a Claude Code session.

entry.title: sheepdog
entry.content: Herds Claude Code through your project's conventions: injects a per-project task->skill routing table on every prompt and blocks edits to governed files unless the matching skill was invoked first. Project rules live in .claude/sheepdog/config.json (scaffold it with /sheepdog:setup); the plugin ships no project-specific rules. Hooks are plain bash + jq; on governed projects the gate fails closed when jq is missing or the config is broken.

entry.title: opensynapse-sample
entry.content: Check a managed OpenSynapse Claude deployment.

entry.title: raf
entry.content: Route explicit service calls to verified providers: the raf runtime MCP server, the trigger skill, a session-context hook, and /raf:status + /raf:connect commands

entry.title: flyte-skills
entry.content: Skills for working with Flyte 2 — deploy Flyte v2 (flyte-binary) clusters on AWS or kind, and author, run, and operate Flyte workflows, apps, agents, data, and ML workloads with the SDK.

entry.title: parallax
entry.content: Parallax equity-research workflows: stock evaluation, portfolio analysis, screening, translation, and client-review skills powered by the Parallax MCP server.

entry.title: claudetag-for-accessowl
entry.content: AccessOwl skills for Claude, built on the AccessOwl REST API.

entry.title: autodl-remote
entry.content: SSH CLI and MCP tools for AutoDL accounts, commands, files, jobs, fleets, tmux, dashboards, and shutdown.

entry.title: pebble
entry.content: Super-personal memory for Claude Code — profile, skills, and knowledge that survive compaction and sessions.

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Conduct a parallel multi-session sprint: one conductor, several work managers in git worktrees, a file-based mailbox, watchdog supervision, and a clean teardown.

entry.title: gestalt-kit
entry.content: Gestalt monorepo toolkit � skills and agents for Portfolio and Deviante. ux-writer for production copy from content-strategist briefs. Tool-agnostic navigation: partials/kit-navigation.md. UC esteira gate before coding.

entry.title: demo-plugin
entry.content: A minimal example plugin demonstrating how Claude Code skills work.

entry.title: luobo-skills
entry.content: luobo's agent skills — grilling, spec/ticket flows, TDD, code review, domain modelling and more.

entry.title: optique
entry.content: Agent skill for building command-line interfaces with Optique

entry.title: skills
entry.content: A collection of software-engineering skills for Claude Code — code review, TDD, spec/plan workflows, bug diagnosis, domain modeling, and more. Based on Matt Pocock's skills (https://github.com/mattpocock/skills).

entry.title: parfait
entry.content: Executive-assistant skills for Parfait, the local-first macOS meeting notetaker: work your curated follow-up queue (Parfait extracts follow-ups when it writes notes; you review them in the app, Claude executes), get a pre-meeting brief, and roll up your week — backed by the Parfait MCP server on your Mac.

entry.title: toko-gaming
entry.content: A minimal example Claude Code plugin for Toko Gaming, demonstrating how skills work.

entry.title: lancedb
entry.content: Write, review, debug, and document LanceDB pipelines in Python and TypeScript that work across local LanceDB OSS tables and remote LanceDB Enterprise/Cloud tables, with idiomatic query/search patterns and performance defaults for ingestion, indexing, filtering, and diagnostics.

entry.title: Veezee
entry.content: Veezee

entry.title: mcp-claudecode
entry.content: mcp-claudecode

entry.title: glass
entry.content: glass

entry.title: AI Router MCP Server
entry.content: AI Router MCP Server

entry.title: Agent Escalation Harness
entry.content: Agent Escalation Harness

entry.title: TipRanks
entry.content: TipRanks

entry.title: forensic-rag-mcp
entry.content: forensic-rag-mcp

entry.title: eSewa-Khalti MCP
entry.content: eSewa-Khalti MCP

entry.title: GitLab MCP Server
entry.content: GitLab MCP Server

entry.title: Fuel Radar MCP Server
entry.content: Fuel Radar MCP Server

entry.title: datanika-mcp
entry.content: datanika-mcp

entry.title: underwriting-mcp
entry.content: underwriting-mcp

entry.title: kismet-wireless-mcp
entry.content: kismet-wireless-mcp

entry.title: swagger-openapi-mcp
entry.content: swagger-openapi-mcp

entry.title: deAPI MCP Server
entry.content: deAPI MCP Server

entry.title: Bohrium MCP Server
entry.content: Bohrium MCP Server

entry.title: systematic
entry.content: Structured engineering workflows for Claude Code.

entry.title: medik8s-release
entry.content: Release workflows for medik8s/RHWA operators — upstream tagging, community catalog PRs, downstream midstream version bumps, FBC catalog generation, Konflux release orchestration, and cross-repo verification

entry.title: lynk-build
entry.content: The Lynk build agent: skills, bundled docs, and subagents for building and maintaining a Lynk semantic layer.

entry.title: apify-pre-seed-investors
entry.content: Build fundraising outreach lists of pre-seed, seed, and early-stage investors filtered by industry, firm type, and country, with partner contacts, emails when available, and check sizes.

entry.title: personal
entry.content: Personal collection of skills.

entry.title: canvas-lms-api
entry.content: Subject-matter expert on the Canvas LMS REST API. Ships a progressive-disclosure skill covering all 142 API resource groups (~1,078 endpoints), object models, and conceptual guides (auth, pagination, SIS imports, LTI, Live Events, RBAC permissions).

entry.title: worklog
entry.content: Local-first, git-native visible-WIP work tracking: plans become tickets, roadmaps stay generated, unplanned work gets recorded. Skills, /worklog:* commands, and an ExitPlanMode capture hook.

entry.title: aspicio-dxf-viewer
entry.content: aspicio-dxf-viewer

entry.title: ehrms-tools
entry.content: EHRMS 開發工具包：JIRA MCP、DB MCP 與 ehrms-memory（HRMS_MEMORY 團隊共用記憶＋HRMS_JIRA 維運單結案紀錄）及 MCP 設定管理 skill。

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: apify-google-events-ai
entry.content: Give an AI agent live local event data from Google Events. One bounded call returns structured listings with dates, venues, ratings, and ticket links, ready to rank, summarize, or push into a calendar.

entry.title: premortem-coach
entry.content: Pre-mortem coaching for software projects. Runs an imagined-failure facilitation session, then produces a kickoff document with ranked risks, mitigations, and early-warning signals.

entry.title: paperos-workspace
entry.content: The core PaperOS platform connector for Claude: workspaces, reports, documents, batch uploads, workflow/task drill-down, and records. Bundles the prod and staging connectors with the usage playbook as a skill.

entry.title: tedtoolkit-roslynhelper
entry.content: Skill for composing generated C# with TedToolkit.RoslynHelper.

entry.title: cio
entry.content: AI Chief Investment Officer — live multi-market portfolio valuation, deep stock research, technical scans, policy-driven allocation decisions. Speaks Chinese by default.

entry.title: apify-google-maps-directions-api
entry.content: Get Google Maps directions as JSON. Address, coordinates, or place ID in; route options with distance, ETA, per-mode durations, turn-by-turn steps, and a maps link out.

entry.title: apify-scrape-google-jobs
entry.content: Scrape Google Jobs listings into structured JSON. Query by role and location; one row per listing with title, company, source platform, description, highlights, posting age, and direct apply links.

entry.title: tedtoolkit-shared
entry.content: Shared development skills for .NET projects.

entry.title: runpod
entry.content: Official Runpod agent skills and MCP server — run Runpod tasks (pods, serverless, templates, volumes) with runpodctl and flash, plus conceptual guidance and worked golden paths.

entry.title: router-builder
entry.content: Package-specific assistant for the router_builder Flutter package: project setup, adding routes, policy and deep-link debugging, build_runner troubleshooting, route audits, and versioned migrations (v2 to v3).

entry.title: engineering-os
entry.content: The engineering-os pipeline as a Claude Code plugin: the /pipeline driver skill, five routed seat agents (reference cross-family routing), four eos-* routing-free panel seats, and vendored prompt templates + manifest generator. Layer-2 advisory; process-guard CI and branch protection remain the walls.

entry.title: yaebal
entry.content: telegram bot development with the yaebal framework: skills for bots, plugins, testing and deployment, plus an mcp server with the exact bot api schema.

entry.title: apple-foundation-models-handoff
entry.content: Design, implement, review, debug, and validate Apple Foundation Models handoff architectures.

entry.title: codegate
entry.content: A read-only delivery gate for Claude Code that combines evidence-based review with one independent Codex adversarial review.

entry.title: tedtoolkit-annotations
entry.content: Skills for writing clear C# comments and annotations.

entry.title: apify-baidu-rank-tracker
entry.content: Track where a brand, domain, or competitor ranks on Baidu. Scheduled keyword checks read organic positions per SERP page and build a rank history for China SEO reporting, brand monitoring, and competitor watch.

entry.title: delegation
entry.content: Delegate work to Cursor composers instead of spending Claude limits, and never trust what an agent reports about itself. Three modes: research (scouts whose every cited URL is checked against the tool log), implement (one writer on an isolated branch behind acceptance gates and a repair loop), transform (a parallel pool applying one rule across independent files). Acceptance is deterministic and observable-effect based; a partial result counts as a failure, and a run with no oracle is reported as unverified rather than green.

entry.title: apify-baidu-search-api
entry.content: Get Baidu search results as structured JSON without a Chinese account. One item per SERP page with organic results (position, title, link), related searches, people also search for, and top searches, filtered by device, language, and time period.

entry.title: apify-google-flights-api
entry.content: Structured Google Flights results by route and date: price, airlines, times, stops, duration, and price insights. One-way, round-trip, and multi-city with price, stop, and airline filters.

entry.title: gamesmm
entry.content: Social posts for games in your own voice. On first run the skill captures a style passport from your real posts and remembers your platforms; after that, any piece of news turns into a set of posts written the way you would write them.

entry.title: google-workspace
entry.content: Create, read and edit Google Workspace resources (Docs, Drive, Sheets, Calendar) directly from Claude Code using the official `gws` CLI from googleworkspace/cli.

entry.title: distill-corpus
entry.content: Read, verify, and curate a receipt-backed Distill research corpus, including bounded active-session worker handoffs.

entry.title: gerador-de-quiz-mentoria-fluxo
entry.content: Gerador de Quiz RTG. Cria quizzes de vendas automaticamente no estilo Inlead — 13 etapas estruturadas para converter leads em compradores. Coleta dados do produto, tema e depoimentos, depois gera todas as telas do quiz: abertura, dados demograficos, diagnostico, dores, desejos, depoimentos, micro-compromisso, carregamento e pagina de vendas interna.

entry.title: ja-writing-tools-refine-ja
entry.content: 日本語文章の推敲・リライト支援。小説、ブログ、技術文書など、目的に合わせた文体や表現の改善を提案します。

entry.title: ja-writing-tools-proofread-ja
entry.content: 日本語テキストの校正に特化した Claude Code プラグイン。誤字脱字・同音異義語・表記揺れ・文法をチェックします。

entry.title: apify-yandex-scraper-bulk-serp
entry.content: Run a keyword list through Yandex across 6 domains, 19 languages, and any lr region, and get structured organic, ads, knowledge graph, and inline media results billed per item.

entry.title: codex-implementation-loop
entry.content: A review-gated implementation loop: dispatch coding units to Codex (codex-companion runtime), review the diff, iterate on the same thread, gate on the full test suite, then ship as a PR. Encodes hard-won environment constraints (read-only git, no full-suite runs, stuck-job handling) and seven user-configurable dials.

entry.title: scroll-spy
entry.content: Package-specific skills for the scroll_spy Flutter package: integration, primary-selection tuning, diagnosis, performance optimization, v0.2-to-v1 migration, and visibility_detector conversion.

entry.title: tedtoolkit-project-development
entry.content: Skills for repository structure, change design and TDD implementation, README writing, and architecture decisions.

entry.title: claude-kit-hooks
entry.content: PR-workflow and safety hooks from claude-kit: force-push guard, secret-read speed bump, pre-PR review gate, pre-PR docs freshness check, post-PR reflection. Skip this plugin if your project already registers its own equivalents — they would fire twice.

entry.title: apify-google-events-tracking
entry.content: Track Google Events listings as structured JSON. Query by city, venue, or artist with date filters; one row per results page with event titles, dates, addresses, venue ratings, and ticket links, ready to diff across runs.

entry.title: chatcut
entry.content: ChatCut plugin for editable video editing and creation workflows from Claude Code.

entry.title: planning-poker
entry.content: Estimate tasks via agent-team planning poker: question, blind vote, discussion, and re-vote.

entry.title: yasashii-secretary
entry.content: あなた専属のAI秘書。記憶、通常のプロジェクト、選択したChatwork／Google Chat履歴を1つのprivate GitHub repoで管理する。

entry.title: apify-google-ai-overview-api
entry.content: Fetch Google AI Overview answers and cited sources as structured JSON. One query or a batch; one row per query with ordered text blocks, references with link and source domain, and a fetched_at timestamp.

entry.title: accounted
entry.content: Official Accounted plugin: Swedish double-entry bookkeeping flows for Claude. Connects your ledger over MCP and ships short workflow skills (daily bookkeeping, health check, month close, VAT, payroll, year-end) that work from the company's live data and load Swedish accounting knowledge from the product when needed. Every write is staged for your approval; nothing is booked on its own.

entry.title: paper-generator
entry.content: Idea-to-paper pipeline: discuss a research idea, pick a venue, set up experiments, implement, evaluate, write a LaTeX paper, and iterate with simulated peer review until acceptance.

entry.title: agent-gate
entry.content: Deterministic enforcement for coding agents: block turn-end when a required skill/MCP call is missing, force a handoff before context fills, re-inject it after compaction, and gate source edits on task readiness.

entry.title: apify-flight-price-api
entry.content: Collect current airfares by route and date with price insights (lowest price, price level, typical range), ready to compare across dates, export, or poll on a schedule with bounded cost.

entry.title: probe-research
entry.content: Probe Research: experiment tracking for agentic ML/RL training. Skills for tracking runs, reusing/versioning assets, and publishing results, wired to a read-only Probe Research MCP server. Writes go through the `probe` CLI (installed via /probe-research-setup).

entry.title: ultraresearch
entry.content: Rigorous multi-source research harness with scope interview, source triage, and red-team falsification.

entry.title: ExecuFunction MCP Server
entry.content: ExecuFunction MCP Server

entry.title: orcaslicer-mcp
entry.content: orcaslicer-mcp

entry.title: Sendable
entry.content: Sendable

entry.title: GitHub MCP Server
entry.content: GitHub MCP Server

entry.title: sports-mcp-server
entry.content: sports-mcp-server

entry.title: @goldhold/mcp-server
entry.content: @goldhold/mcp-server

entry.title: postiz-mcp
entry.content: postiz-mcp

entry.title: viruagent-mcp
entry.content: viruagent-mcp

entry.title: BOE & EUR-Lex MCP Server
entry.content: BOE & EUR-Lex MCP Server

entry.title: BNB Chain MCP Server
entry.content: BNB Chain MCP Server

entry.title: pathways-mcp-server
entry.content: pathways-mcp-server

entry.title: Quip MCP Server
entry.content: Quip MCP Server

entry.title: QA Prompts MCP Server
entry.content: QA Prompts MCP Server

entry.title: meals-mcp-server
entry.content: meals-mcp-server

entry.title: EdgeOne Makers MCP Server
entry.content: EdgeOne Makers MCP Server

entry.title: API Manager Server
entry.content: API Manager Server

entry.title: spacecode
entry.content: Cloud dev environments for Claude Code — run tasks, reviews, and CI in ephemeral sandboxes via SpaceCode

entry.title: fp
entry.content: Flightplan — spec-driven development. A living-spec backbone (OpenSpec) with constitution guardrails (Spec Kit), a context-engineered execution engine (GSD) and craftsmanship skills (Superpowers). Drive it with /fp:propose, /fp:tasks, /fp:implement, /fp:archive.

entry.title: czech-o2-tariff
entry.content: Manage an O2 Czech Republic mobile tariff (personal or business): bills, tier changes, datová schránka communication, international eSIM strategy.

entry.title: shipspec
entry.content: Spec-driven delivery protocol for humans and AI agents: role agents, a gsd workflow skill, and a verification gate wired to .gsd/workflow.json.

entry.title: aiwatch
entry.content: Live AI service reliability from AIWatch — get notified the moment an upstream provider (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and more) goes down, plus an /aiwatch status command. Answers "is it me or them?" without leaving your terminal.

entry.title: powerpmac-dev
entry.content: OMRON Delta Tau Power PMAC 개발 지식 스킬 — Script 모션 프로그램·PLC·C 프로그래밍, 데이터구조 요소(Sys./Motor[]/Coord[]/Gate3[]), IDE·로컬/EtherCAT 모터 셋업·호밍, 안전 gotchas. 공식 매뉴얼 한국어 정제본 + 라이브 컨트롤러 검증 패턴.

entry.title: lightrag-mcp
entry.content: lightrag-mcp

entry.title: Talamus
entry.content: Talamus

entry.title: easyaccesspdf-mcp
entry.content: easyaccesspdf-mcp

entry.title: wiki-master
entry.content: Maintain a Karpathy-style LLM wiki on Obsidian using the native obsidian CLI.

entry.title: feel-then-build
entry.content: A relentless two-phase interview: first the feel (experience), then the build (implementation, part by part), keeping every decision with the user.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: Forge activation front door: makes Forge's presence and the `activation` bootstrap skill discoverable in ANY project via one global install, with a read-only SessionStart nudge. Creates nothing until you run a mutating verb.

entry.title: design-doc-writer-jp
entry.content: 日本語で Design Doc / RFC を新規作成、改訂、レビューする

entry.title: claude-harness-builder
entry.content: Interactive wizard that builds a Claude Code harness in your project: settings.json permission presets, a CLAUDE.md skeleton, enforcement hooks for 7 hook events with ready-to-use script templates, and custom slash commands generated from your description. Invoke /claude-harness-builder:wizard or just ask to 'set up a harness for this project'.

entry.title: cm-dev-tools
entry.content: Config Manager development toolkit: 7 workflow skills (scaffold, fleet review, release, PR lifecycle, parity check, PR comments, docs sync) + bash helper scripts + MCP server (8 tools with structured JSON I/O) + 2 custom agents. Uses built-in CLI agent capabilities (Copilot CLI / Claude Code), standard local tooling, and shell commands.

entry.title: appraisal-grill
entry.content: Grill the user relentlessly about their appraisal claims and evidence to stress-test them before submitting.

entry.title: cc-notify
entry.content: Hear when Claude Code is done. A melody that encodes the outcome, then a spoken one-line summary — including the question when Claude stops to ask you something.

entry.title: overfit
entry.content: Run a private LLM inside your own .NET process with Overfit — pure C#, on the CPU, no Python, no Ollama, no cloud. Adds local inference (chat/RAG/embeddings) to an existing project, and builds offline, deterministic, zero-cost eval harnesses for agent skills and prompts.

entry.title: gt-appraisal
entry.content: Calibration-style interview to extract appraisal evidence, then draft a GovTech Designer self-appraisal write-up.

entry.title: arcana
entry.content: Semantic vector DB for project knowledge — search, store, browse with local ONNX embeddings

entry.title: lg
entry.content: A learn-by-building system that turns project development into structured learning opportunities. Provides phased learning plans with dual-track progress tracking (learning milestones + project deliverables).

entry.title: kradleverse-stream
entry.content: Stream live KradleVerse game observations into Claude Code via SSE — replaces polling with real-time events

entry.title: interface-design
entry.content: Design engineering for Claude Code. Build interfaces with craft, memory, and consistency. Maintains design decisions across sessions.

entry.title: haiku
entry.content: 軽量モデル (Haiku) にブラインドで資料を読ませ、理解の再現から分かりやすさを検証する読解チェック。日本語資料用の haiku:yomu と英語資料用の haiku:retell の 2 スキルを同梱

entry.title: genops
entry.content: Omni infrastructure-as-code agent. Scaffold, generate, and maintain IaC for any tool/provider, copying bundled templates instead of regenerating.

entry.title: skillloom
entry.content: Policy-gated self-learning for portable Agent Skills across Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: product-org-os
entry.content: A full product organization on Claude Code: 12 role-based agents (CPO, VP Product, PMs, BizOps, Competitive Intelligence, and a Product Leadership Team) plus 130+ skills for PRDs, roadmaps, business cases, GTM, pricing, and competitive analysis. MIT-licensed, built on the Agent Skills open standard.

entry.title: superglue
entry.content: Build, test, and manage superglue tools via the sg CLI. Use when working with superglue tools, systems, APIs, SDKs, or the sg command.

entry.title: md2alloy
entry.content: Turn markdown docs (+ code) into an RFC 2119 spec and a machine-checked Alloy 6 model, then verify it headlessly and report counterexamples. Driven by Claude Code — no LLM API keys.

entry.title: specai
entry.content: Task-Driven Development: planning, TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and delivery workflows

entry.title: agent-browser-guide
entry.content: Browser automation using agent-browser CLI. Trigger when: browsing web pages, taking screenshots, extracting styles, auditing UI, checking web apps, scraping content, testing responsive design, or any task requiring a browser. Replaces Playwright MCP and claude-in-chrome MCP as the default browser tool.

entry.title: integration-skills
entry.content: Agentic workflows for building, reviewing, and maintaining Elastic integration packages.

entry.title: benhvienphutho-skills
entry.content: Hospital document skills for BVĐK tỉnh Phú Thọ — HCQT, Điều dưỡng, QLCL, CNTT, KTDA, Vật tư, TCCB, Đào tạo, NCKH&HTQT, officecli, setup, and grilling reference.

entry.title: js-tooling
entry.content: Adopt and audit the @rtorcato/js-tooling shared presets via its CLI, and follow the family's semantic-release publishing rules.

entry.title: cognito-plugin
entry.content: Persistent structured memory system for Claude — stores decisions, context, tasks, architecture, and working patterns across sessions as compiled markdown files on disk. Includes auto-save hooks, diary for long-term wisdom, and slash commands for memory operations.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: agent-deck
entry.content: Decks of MCP tools, keys, and self-improving playbooks that bind per-workspace.

entry.title: humalike-audit
entry.content: Run a Humalike social audit on a chat transcript: score how an AI agent's messages landed, flag the ones that damaged the conversation, and rewrite them.

entry.title: interface-design
entry.content: Design engineering for Claude Code. Build interfaces with craft, memory, and consistency. Maintains design decisions across sessions.

entry.title: powerbi-skills
entry.content: Power BI development skills for Claude Code: DAX authoring, data modeling, PBIP scaffolding, report theming, CI/CD

entry.title: Bloomberg MCP
entry.content: Bloomberg MCP

entry.title: presentation-builder
entry.content: Build professional PowerPoint presentations with AI-generated images, icons, screenshots, and HTML-to-PPTX conversion

entry.title: interface-design
entry.content: Design engineering for Claude Code. Build interfaces with craft, memory, and consistency. Maintains design decisions across sessions.

entry.title: multi-agent-council
entry.content: Multi-LLM council for architecture decisions and code reviews. Orchestrates Claude + external LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini) through a 3-round protocol for diverse AI perspectives and thorough analysis.

entry.title: emasoft-universal-clipboard
entry.content: Cross-platform clipboard operations for Claude Code agents. Native macOS/Windows/WSL support plus Linux scripts with Wayland, X11, and history tracking.

entry.title: lmnr
entry.content: Trace Claude Code sessions in Laminar: conversational turns, LLM calls, tool executions, and subagents.

entry.title: docker
entry.content: Container-based development for isolated, reproducible environments for npm commands, packages, code execution, and dependencies.

entry.title: ipykernel-mcp
entry.content: ipykernel-mcp

entry.title: TokenOracle MCP
entry.content: TokenOracle MCP

entry.title: mymore
entry.content: mymore

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.content: s3-mcp-server

entry.title: teralynk-mcp-server
entry.content: teralynk-mcp-server

entry.title: fde-demo-builder
entry.content: Turn a raw screen recording into a polished, VO-narrated, privacy-scrubbed demo video — fully scripted (ffmpeg + edge-tts + headless Chrome), no video editor. Built for FDE product demos.

entry.title: develop21
entry.content: Career coach and agent toolset - honest job-fit reviews, resumes and cover letters in the employer's language, via the Develop21 connector.

entry.title: feflow
entry.content: 前端研发协作治理层 — 默认像强助手，按风险启用 Item、Memory、Evidence 与 Incident 能力

entry.title: econ-write
entry.content: Write, edit, restructure, and audit economics papers using field-aware guidance from leading economists.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: TablaCognita
entry.content: TablaCognita

entry.title: parallax
entry.content: Cross-model verification for Claude Code: an evidence-grounded adversarial debate between the session model and a cross-vendor reviewer gates plans before implementation and diffs before merge, hooked into the superpowers workflow.

entry.title: superx
entry.content: Twitter/X growth CLI for reading posts and analytics, finding your most engaged contacts, and creating draft or scheduled posts and threads through the SuperX API

entry.title: small-trader
entry.content: Survival-first, broker-agnostic Indian-equity decision-support kit (research/educational, advisory-only): read-only screening, research, portfolio evaluation, watchlist monitoring, and scheduled reviews across claude.ai surfaces; fail-closed, write-tool-denied. Not investment advice; not a SEBI-registered IA/RA. No warranty.

entry.title: se-harness-copilot
entry.content: GitHub Copilot CLI variant (generated from se-harness): agent roster, harness skills, goal-loop commands, bundled enforcement hooks. Install this one with `copilot plugin install` — see docs/setup-guide-copilot.md.

entry.title: wop
entry.content: Open the most relevant link from the conversation in the browser (macOS).

entry.title: harness-evolution
entry.content: The core Evolving Harness loop: extract skills from sessions, save learned lessons, analyze agent sessions, and evolve the skill repo - includes the framework router and output-style setup.

entry.title: se-harness
entry.content: AI-agentic SDLC harness: goal loop with human-in-the-loop gates, budgeted context injection, org compose-first conventions, and requirement traceability.

entry.title: jackframework
entry.content: Build on, launch, and debug JackFramework: the hook contract, CLI flags, checkpoint semantics, and a symptom-to-cause catalog for the framework's silent failure modes.

entry.title: biometric-vault
entry.content: Package-specific skills for the biometric_vault Flutter plugin: correct integration with per-platform setup, symptom-to-fix troubleshooting, consumer test fakes, and safe migration from biometric_storage.

entry.title: warden
entry.content: Turns standing preferences into well-formed, correctly-scoped CLAUDE.md rules. Asks one question at a time, picks global vs project scope, and keeps rules files small enough that Claude actually follows them. Runs no background code.

entry.title: dvcon-papers
entry.content: Search, read, and chat with the DVCon conference paper corpus via the dvcon MCP server, a dvcon-papers skill, and a /dvcon slash command.

entry.title: academic-skills-food-nutrition
entry.content: Original, MIT-licensed academic skills for food, nutrition & agricultural science: research, journal-aware writing, peer review, and end-to-end orchestration, plus publisher-tiered journal author-guideline skills (food, nutrition, agriculture Q1/Q2, and multidisciplinary) and a scientific figure workflow, for Claude Code, Codex, MiniMax Agent, and OpenClaw. Initiated by the Food Science Group, University of Melbourne; contributions from food, nutrition & agriculture research groups worldwide welcome.

entry.title: universal-memory
entry.content: Cross-session, cross-device memory for Claude Code. Markdown-first captures, vector-backed recall. Points at any universal-memory server — local Docker, remote self-hosted, or cloud-backed. Auto-starts the server on demand when configured to.

entry.title: warden-invariants
entry.content: Optional companion to warden. Re-injects your hard rules on every prompt so they survive context compaction. Adds a UserPromptSubmit hook that reads one local file and writes nothing.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: Professional UI/UX design intelligence for AI coding assistants. Includes searchable databases of styles, colors, typography, charts, and UX guidelines for React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Jetpack Compose.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 60 agents, 232 skills, 75 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: bough-hooks
entry.content: bough's observe → instinct → inject → evolve loop as Claude Code hooks. Install at project scope so it observes only the repo you choose.

entry.title: loopita
entry.content: Meta-orchestration skill: picks an execution strategy (single pass, bounded loop, or parallel sub-agent swarm) and drives it to completion with durable state and audit trails.

entry.title: balena
entry.content: balena agent skills: convert Docker projects to balenaCloud, and write pine/SBVR API queries.

entry.title: proof-read
entry.content: Proofread markdown documents in four passes: auto-fix typos and grammar, then annotate sentence- and document-level issues with review tags.

entry.title: unraid-mcp
entry.content: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, rclone, and live telemetry.

entry.title: livepilot
entry.content: Agentic production system for Ableton Live 12 — 467 tools, 56 domains, 44 semantic moves, device atlas (5264 devices, 120 enriched, 7 indexes), Splice intelligence (gRPC + GraphQL describe-a-sound + preview + collections + presets), 9-band spectral perception auto-loaded via ensure_analyzer_on_master, Creative Director skill, technique memory, neo-Riemannian harmony, Euclidean rhythm, species counterpoint, MIDI I/O

entry.title: uploads
entry.content: Get screenshots, GIFs, recordings, and files into GitHub PRs and issues via uploads.sh. Bundles the github-screenshots + uploads-cli skills, a local MCP server, and the /uploads:attach command.

entry.title: tethr
entry.content: Always-on daily companion: one persistent session that is both chat companion and background orchestrator, with a durable SQLite queue, self-wake processing, triage, audits, and a nightly dream-stage.

entry.title: saas-marketing
entry.content: Your AI B2B SaaS marketing team: 13 skills across content, SEO/AEO, paid media, social, email, design, sales enablement, product marketing, analytics, and project management, coordinated by the CATALYST multi-agent orchestrator.

entry.title: adversarial-review
entry.content: Adversarial review of anything — code, docs, design, config. One independent subagent per round, each with an opposing bias: hunt defects, delete, doubt assumptions, consume it, attack it. Demands executed evidence, reports grouped by round.

entry.title: jwt-auth-auditor
entry.content: Audit a codebase's JWT, refresh token, session cookie, risk-based authentication, and OIDC implementation against RFC 8725, RFC 9700, OWASP cheat sheets, and NIST SP 800-63B-4. Produces a tiered scorecard with evidence-backed findings and concrete fixes.

entry.title: swarm-brainstorm
entry.content: The Court Jester Protocol: swarm brainstorming that fans out persona agents, statistically filters genuine outliers, and synthesizes a baseline-vs-emergent report.

entry.title: learn-everything
entry.content: Turn any video, audio, or text into structured learning notes. Transcribes with GPU-accelerated Whisper, splits into semantic chapters with exact timestamps, and distills active-recall takeaways.

entry.title: sdd-design-skills
entry.content: A Claude Code plugin whose skills guide design from a fuzzy requirement all the way to an experienceable screen, covering UX exploration, UI specification, ubiquitous language mapping, and design build.

entry.title: dossier
entry.content: Run a sovereign, compounding learning loop for a client — ingest their knowledge, extract it into an owned OKF knowledge base, and serve it to agents via tenant-scoped GraphRAG. The agency operator's toolkit: onboarding skills, the expert team, and a per-client MCP retrieval server.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Planning, git, review, delegation, and session-continuity skills

entry.title: ipzitalk
entry.content: 입지톡 Remote 또는 OSS 실행 방식을 선택하고 상태 확인·전환·제거를 안내합니다.

entry.title: workflow
entry.content: Multi-model workflows: /council (round-based deliberation across Claude, Codex, and K-EXAONE) and the korean-report writing skill.

entry.title: material-code-review
entry.content: Evidence-gated review and bounded repair of a concrete Git change scope. Implicitly use only to assess uncommitted changes, a branch or diff, a local ref range, or a PR for material defects, regressions, test gaps protecting changed behavior, or merge readiness. Do not implicitly use for document or generated-output review, output diagnosis, general skill, plugin, or repository analysis, architecture exploration, or planning-only work.

entry.title: kmp-clean-architecture
entry.content: Scaffold KMP features end-to-end: Clean Architecture layers, offline-first/online-first/hybrid/remote-only repositories, Koin DI, SqlDelight, Ktor, Firebase (gitlive), SKIE, spec-driven feature workflow.

entry.title: agentic-control-plane
entry.content: Control, audit, and cost-optimize every Claude Code tool call. Governance hook + bundled ACP MCP (cost X-ray, run traces, policy checks) + /cost-xray pre-ship report.

entry.title: compact-plus
entry.content: Preserve Claude Code session state before and after context compaction.

entry.title: oolio-pm
entry.content: Oolio Product Management. The full PM toolkit, signal to shipped: feedback intake into JPD, idea grooming to Oolio's standards, PRD writing and grilling, validation via the Virtual Product Council and its hospitality personas, Jira hygiene, Steering packs, the GTM suite, metrics review, discovery maps for themes too big for one session, and the research house: HubSpot/web/Apify signal synthesis, competitor dossiers, sweeps and battlecards, win/loss mining, one-off evidence attached as native JPD Insights, plus a compass that routes you to the right skill. Twenty-five skills.

entry.title: sse-bootstrap-sop
entry.content: Standard operating procedure for bootstrapping a TypeScript pnpm-workspace monorepo from a ChatGPT design corpus. Derived from the speech-score-engine repo's actual history (commits bba6f71..6adde86). Carries the historical record at three granularities (phase, commit, plan) plus a forward-reproducible procedure.

entry.title: onthecheap-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the On the Cheap network — free and cheap events, deals and local guides across 14 US cities

entry.title: tiro
entry.content: LLM Wiki suite from the Tiro team — bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, socratic, sync. A persistent, agent-maintained personal knowledge base.

entry.title: meeting-notes
entry.content: Helps structure and summarize meeting notes, capturing key decisions, action items, and follow-ups.

entry.title: tt
entry.content: Commands for discovering your unknowns across the map-vs-territory workflow (trq212, 'The map is not the territory'). Numbered by phase — 0x before: /01-blindspot, /02-brainstorm, /03-interview, /04-references; 1x plan/during: /10-plan (also keeps implementation notes while building); 2x after: /20-pitch, /21-comprehend, /22-memories. Plus the towles-tool skill.

entry.title: docs-tracking
entry.content: Bootstrap a self-maintaining docs-tracking system in any repo: a source-derived ROUTE_REFERENCE map + canonical SYSTEM_DOCS + a read-before/update-after loop that keeps the coding agent editing the right file and querying the right table/collection.

entry.title: semantic-generation
entry.content: Fix referents and semantic roles before introducing labels in designs, reports, and code identifiers.

entry.title: ipzitalk-remote
entry.content: 공식 OAuth로 호스팅 입지톡 MCP와 27개 Remote Skill을 사용합니다.

entry.title: apify-congress-stock-trades-api
entry.content: Query disclosed US Congress stock trades by member, ticker, or date range. One row per House or Senate PTR transaction with member, chamber, ticker, transaction type, amount bracket, dates, and filing IDs.

entry.title: graqle
entry.content: GraQle dev intelligence layer: graph-powered codebase reasoning, impact analysis, and governed edits via MCP, plus governed-workflow skills and an optional governance gate hook.

entry.title: quick-fire
entry.content: Put verbose AI coding agents on a word budget and get straight to the point.

entry.title: saas-alerts-mcp
entry.content: saas-alerts-mcp

entry.title: aphorist-mcp
entry.content: aphorist-mcp

entry.title: unulu
entry.content: unulu

entry.title: MCP IE Migration VRT
entry.content: MCP IE Migration VRT

entry.title: startline-mcp
entry.content: startline-mcp

entry.title: Payme MCP Server
entry.content: Payme MCP Server

entry.title: Greeting MCP Server
entry.content: Greeting MCP Server

entry.title: SearchAtlas MCP Server
entry.content: SearchAtlas MCP Server

entry.title: OpenGrok MCP Server
entry.content: OpenGrok MCP Server

entry.title: docbot-mcp
entry.content: docbot-mcp

entry.title: Proplist MCP Hello World
entry.content: Proplist MCP Hello World

entry.title: ShortsCut MCP
entry.content: ShortsCut MCP

entry.title: Marketic
entry.content: Marketic

entry.title: Statistics Query and Verification MCP
entry.content: Statistics Query and Verification MCP

entry.title: ftx-mcp
entry.content: ftx-mcp

entry.title: Meta Ads MCP Server
entry.content: Meta Ads MCP Server

entry.title: SAGE
entry.content: SAGE

entry.title: web-perf-mcp
entry.content: web-perf-mcp

entry.title: Hubitat MCP Server
entry.content: Hubitat MCP Server

entry.title: mcp-monte-carlo
entry.content: mcp-monte-carlo

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Emilia's personal skills. Includes notify (push notifications to the phone via ntfy).

entry.title: dev-stats
entry.content: Personal dev productivity report: active hours from local Claude Code + Codex CLI session transcripts, lines-of-code contributed via git log, and token usage with an estimated cost.

entry.title: frugal
entry.content: Cloud cost awareness for agents. Reminds the agent to check usage/billing before spending on metered services (Vercel, Cloudflare, Neon, Railway, E2B, Browserbase, AWS...) and to tear down what it provisions.

entry.title: house-cleaning
entry.content: Propose-only deletion-test auditor for codebases: finds provably-dead files, lines, and words via the project's own oracle, and asks for approval before removing anything.

entry.title: hugo-landing
entry.content: Scaffold production-ready Hugo landing page + blog sites: Tailwind CSS, full SEO/JSON-LD, multilingual with hreflang, blog, analytics, and CI/CD for GitHub Pages, Cloudflare Pages, Netlify or AWS Amplify.

entry.title: railward
entry.content: Fail-closed, veto-only decision gate at the agent tool-call choke point, with a re-runnable signed proof of every gated decision.

entry.title: mnemosyne
entry.content: Hardened local-first AI memory: encrypted vaults, verbatim recall, knowledge graph. Requires the `mnemosyne` binary on PATH.

entry.title: c2kim-claude-plugin
entry.content: TODO: describe what this plugin provides
